title: Entry point for community-level testing ValueSet Display Values
description: Display values for Entry point for community-level testing ValueSet ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

HIV.B.DE19.en: Mobile testing (e.g. through vans or temporary testing facilities)

HIV.B.DE20.en: Voluntary counselling and testing centres (not within a health facility setting)
